subject: ENGINE API
truth: Stop using the ENGINE API; use providers instead.
quote: The ENGINE API is deprecated; use providers instead.

subject: EVP_MD_meth_new, EVP_CIPHER_meth_new, EVP_PKEY_meth_new
truth: Stop using EVP_MD_meth_new(), EVP_CIPHER_meth_new(), and EVP_PKEY_meth_new(); implement a provider instead.
quote: EVP_MD_meth_new(), EVP_CIPHER_meth_new(), and EVP_PKEY_meth_new() are deprecated; implement a provider instead.

subject: RSA_meth_new, EC_KEY_METHOD_new
truth: Stop using RSA_meth_new() and EC_KEY_METHOD_new(); implement a provider instead.
quote: RSA_meth_new() and EC_KEY_METHOD_new() are deprecated; implement a provider instead.

subject: EVP_PKEY_set1_engine
truth: Stop using EVP_PKEY_set1_engine(); use providers instead.
quote: EVP_PKEY_set1_engine() is deprecated; use providers.

subject: FIPS_mode, FIPS_mode_set
truth: Stop using FIPS_mode() and FIPS_mode_set(); use EVP_default_properties_is_fips_enabled() and the FIPS provider instead.
quote: FIPS_mode() and FIPS_mode_set() are removed; use EVP_default_properties_is_fips_enabled() and the FIPS provider.

subject: RSA_new, RSA_free, RSA_up_ref
truth: Stop using RSA_new(), RSA_free(), and RSA_up_ref(); use EVP_PKEY_new(), EVP_PKEY_free(), and EVP_PKEY_up_ref() instead.
quote: RSA_new(), RSA_free(), and RSA_up_ref() are deprecated; use EVP_PKEY_new(), EVP_PKEY_free(), EVP_PKEY_up_ref().

subject: DH_new, DSA_new, EC_KEY_new
truth: Stop using DH_new(), DSA_new(), and EC_KEY_new(); use EVP_PKEY_new() and the EVP high-level APIs instead.
quote: DH_new(), DSA_new(), and EC_KEY_new() are deprecated; use EVP_PKEY_new() and the EVP high-level APIs.

subject: AES_encrypt, AES_decrypt, AES_set_encrypt_key
truth: Stop using AES_encrypt(), AES_decrypt(), and AES_set_encrypt_key(); use EVP_EncryptInit_ex(), EVP_EncryptUpdate(), and EVP_EncryptFinal_ex() instead.
quote: AES_encrypt(), AES_decrypt(), and AES_set_encrypt_key() are deprecated; use EVP_EncryptInit_ex(), EVP_EncryptUpdate(), EVP_EncryptFinal_ex().

subject: DES_encrypt, DES_cbc_encrypt, DES_ecb_encrypt
truth: Stop using DES_encrypt(), DES_cbc_encrypt(), and DES_ecb_encrypt(); use the EVP cipher functions instead.
quote: DES_encrypt(), DES_cbc_encrypt(), and DES_ecb_encrypt() are deprecated; use the EVP cipher functions.

subject: SHA1_Init, SHA1_Update, SHA1_Final
truth: Stop using SHA1_Init(), SHA1_Update(), and SHA1_Final(); use EVP_DigestInit_ex(), EVP_DigestUpdate(), and EVP_DigestFinal_ex() instead.
quote: SHA1_Init(), SHA1_Update(), and SHA1_Final() are deprecated; use EVP_DigestInit_ex(), EVP_DigestUpdate(), EVP_DigestFinal_ex().

subject: MD5_Init, MD5_Update, MD5_Final
truth: Stop using MD5_Init(), MD5_Update(), and MD5_Final(); use the EVP digest functions or EVP_Q_digest() instead.
quote: MD5_Init(), MD5_Update(), and MD5_Final() are deprecated; use the EVP digest functions or EVP_Q_digest().

subject: RSA_get0_n, RSA_get0_e, RSA_get0_d
truth: Stop using RSA_get0_n(), RSA_get0_e(), and RSA_get0_d(); use EVP_PKEY_get_bn_param() or EVP_PKEY_get_params() instead.
quote: RSA_get0_n(), RSA_get0_e(), and RSA_get0_d() are deprecated; use EVP_PKEY_get_bn_param() / EVP_PKEY_get_params().

subject: DH_get0_p, DH_get0_g, DH_get0_key
truth: Stop using DH_get0_p(), DH_get0_g(), and DH_get0_key(); use EVP_PKEY_get_params() instead.
quote: DH_get0_p(), DH_get0_g(), and DH_get0_key() are deprecated; use EVP_PKEY_get_params().

subject: RSA_set0_key
truth: Stop using RSA_set0_key(); use EVP_PKEY_fromdata() instead.
quote: RSA_set0_key() is deprecated; use EVP_PKEY_fromdata().

subject: EVP_PKEY_get0_RSA
old: EVP_PKEY_get0_RSA() returned a mutable pointer to the internal key
new: EVP_PKEY_get0_RSA() returns a const pointer to a cached copy; changes to the internal key are not reflected
truth: EVP_PKEY_get0_RSA() now returns a const pointer to a cached copy of a provider-managed key; treat it as read-only and do not expect modifications to propagate.
quote: EVP_PKEY_get0_RSA() now returns a const pointer to a cached copy of a provider-managed key; treat it as read-only, and changes to the internal key are not reflected in the cached copy.

from_fact: evp_pkey_get0_rsa() returned a mutable pointer to the internal key
evp_pkey_get0_rsa() returns a const pointer to a cached copy; changes to the internal key are not reflected

subject: EVP_PKEY_get0_EC_KEY, EVP_PKEY_get0_DSA, EVP_PKEY_get0_DH
old: EVP_PKEY_get0_EC_KEY(), EVP_PKEY_get0_DSA(), EVP_PKEY_get0_DH() returned mutable pointers
new: These functions now return const pointers
truth: EVP_PKEY_get0_EC_KEY(), EVP_PKEY_get0_DSA(), and EVP_PKEY_get0_DH() now return const pointers; treat them as read-only.
quote: EVP_PKEY_get0_EC_KEY(), EVP_PKEY_get0_DSA(), and EVP_PKEY_get0_DH() now return const pointers; treat them as read-only.

from_fact: evp_pkey_get0_ec_key(), evp_pkey_get0_dsa(), evp_pkey_get0_dh() returned mutable pointers
these functions now return const pointers

subject: d2i_RSAPrivateKey, d2i_RSAPublicKey
truth: Stop using d2i_RSAPrivateKey() and d2i_RSAPublicKey(); use OSSL_DECODER_from_bio() instead.
quote: d2i_RSAPrivateKey() and d2i_RSAPublicKey() are deprecated; use OSSL_DECODER_from_bio().

subject: PEM_read_RSAPrivateKey
truth: Stop using PEM_read_RSAPrivateKey(); use PEM_read_bio_PrivateKey_ex() instead.
quote: PEM_read_RSAPrivateKey() is deprecated; use PEM_read_bio_PrivateKey_ex().

subject: RSA_generate_key
truth: Stop using RSA_generate_key(); use EVP_PKEY_keygen() instead.
quote: RSA_generate_key() is deprecated; use EVP_PKEY_keygen().

subject: EC_KEY_generate_key
truth: Stop using EC_KEY_generate_key(); use EVP_PKEY_generate() instead.
quote: EC_KEY_generate_key() is deprecated; use EVP_PKEY_generate().

subject: RSA_sign, RSA_verify
truth: Stop using RSA_sign() and RSA_verify(); use EVP_DigestSign() and EVP_DigestVerify() instead.
quote: RSA_sign() and RSA_verify() are deprecated; use EVP_DigestSign() and EVP_DigestVerify().

subject: ECDSA_sign, ECDSA_verify
truth: Stop using ECDSA_sign() and ECDSA_verify(); use EVP_DigestSign() and EVP_DigestVerify() instead.
quote: ECDSA_sign() and ECDSA_verify() are deprecated; use EVP_DigestSign() and EVP_DigestVerify().

subject: DH_compute_key, ECDH_compute_key
truth: Stop using DH_compute_key() and ECDH_compute_key(); use EVP_PKEY_derive() instead.
quote: DH_compute_key() and ECDH_compute_key() are deprecated; use EVP_PKEY_derive().

subject: HMAC_Init, HMAC_Update, HMAC_Final
truth: Stop using HMAC_Init(), HMAC_Update(), and HMAC_Final(); use EVP_Q_mac() or the EVP_MAC layer instead.
quote: HMAC_Init(), HMAC_Update(), and HMAC_Final() are deprecated; use EVP_Q_mac() or the EVP_MAC layer.

subject: CMAC_Init, CMAC_Update, CMAC_Final
truth: Stop using CMAC_Init(), CMAC_Update(), and CMAC_Final(); use EVP_MAC_init(), EVP_MAC_update(), and EVP_MAC_final() instead.
quote: CMAC_Init(), CMAC_Update(), and CMAC_Final() are deprecated; use EVP_MAC_init(), EVP_MAC_update(), EVP_MAC_final().

subject: RAND_DRBG subsystem
truth: Stop using the RAND_DRBG subsystem; use the EVP_RAND API instead.
quote: The RAND_DRBG subsystem is removed; use the EVP_RAND API instead.

subject: RAND_bytes, RAND_priv_bytes
truth: RAND_bytes() and RAND_priv_bytes() may need a library context; use RAND_bytes_ex() and RAND_priv_bytes_ex() instead.
quote: RAND_bytes() and RAND_priv_bytes() may need a library context; use RAND_bytes_ex() and RAND_priv_bytes_ex().

subject: EVP_PKEY_set_alias_type()
truth: Stop using EVP_PKEY_set_alias_type() as it has been removed with no replacement.
quote: `EVP_PKEY_set_alias_type()` is removed with no replacement.

subject: BN_is_prime_ex() and BN_is_prime_fasttest_ex()
truth: Stop using BN_is_prime_ex() and BN_is_prime_fasttest_ex(); use BN_check_prime() instead.
quote: `BN_is_prime_ex()` and `BN_is_prime_fasttest_ex()` are deprecated; use `BN_check_prime()`.

subject: EVP_sha256() and EVP_aes_256_gcm()
truth: EVP_sha256() and EVP_aes_256_gcm() may incur a performance penalty; fetch algorithms explicitly with EVP_MD_fetch() and EVP_CIPHER_fetch() instead.
quote: `EVP_sha256()` and `EVP_aes_256_gcm()` may incur a performance penalty; fetch algorithms with `EVP_MD_fetch()` and `EVP_CIPHER_fetch()`.

subject: SSL_CTX_new()
truth: SSL_CTX_new() may need SSL_CTX_new_ex() to pass a library context; using SSL_CTX_new() without a library context may silently misbehave.
quote: `SSL_CTX_new()` may need `SSL_CTX_new_ex()` to pass a library context.
